ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly states 'Pan' and the characters field already has [pan]. Art depicts a young girl in an orange gi with dark hair and energy aura — consistent with Pan's canonical appearance across Dragon Ball Z and GT.

trivia_bullets.text: Pan is the daughter of Gohan and Videl, granddaughter of Goku and Mr. Satan, and great-granddaughter of both Ox-King and Bardock. She is a quarter-Saiyan — the furthest dilution of Saiyan blood in the main Dragon Ball family tree to demonstrate combat ability. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Pan; Wikipedia: Chi-Chi (Dragon Ball)]

Pan represents four living generations in the Son family: Goku (great-grandparent generation) → Gohan (parent) → Pan → Goku Jr. (in GT timeline). Chi-Chi is her paternal grandmother, making Chi-Chi the maternal link in this lineage chain from fighter to fighter. [CBR: Goku's Complete Family Tree; Dragon Ball Official Site: Pan showcase]

Despite being only a quarter-Saiyan, Pan demonstrated enough latent power to fly as an infant in Dragon Ball Super — a feat that surprised even veteran characters. In GT she is one of the primary protagonists accompanying Goku. The 'Awakening Talent' card title directly references her exceptional latent capacity. [Dragon Ball Official Site: Pan showcase, via WebSearch snippet]

TB2-024 is a Rare rarity card, the same rarity as Chi-Chi (TB2-037), signaling the set's consistent treatment of the Son family female fighters as mid-tier pulls. At $0.22 market price it is Pan's only TB2 representation and functions as her fifth canonical anchor card across the overall inventory. [dbs-cardgame.com]

related_cards.name: Fateful Reunion Chi-Chi
related_cards.note: Chi-Chi is Pan's paternal grandmother; same 4-generation lineage chain.

related_cards.name: Speed Attack Piccolo Jr.
related_cards.note: Piccolo mentored Gohan who is Pan's father; mentor-chain connects these cards.

related_cards.name: Trusting Relationship Kami
related_cards.note: Kami → Piccolo → Gohan → Pan: the stewardship-lineage runs through this chain.
